claim: The holographic brain surface is wired to a live evidence API
evidence: static/3d/brain.html reads /api/a11oy/v1/holographic/brain/evidence; szl3d_holographic.py registers the route
blockers: display sculpting is local; not a model runtime

claim: The estate brain graph exists as a queryable graph
blockers: graph is generated from committed/snapshot metadata, not continuous ingestion
next_step: add durable GitHub/Hugging Face/site event ingestion receipts

evidence: /api/a11oy/v1/brain/search and /api/a11oy/v1/brain/ask route through szl_brain_api; research/brain-evidence-admission/evidence-manifest.json binds a deterministic MEASURED_LOCAL_PILOT that szl_brain_evidence_eval.py replays byte-for-byte
blockers: hash embeddings and graph similarity are modeled; generated prose may be unavailable; the pilot is small, local, lexical-only, and has no established external validity
next_step: run the locked lexical/vector/graph/hybrid benchmark on an independent admitted corpus without generalizing the local pilot

evidence: szl_brainmemory ranks graph nodes and degrades to STRUCTURAL-ONLY without real recency
blockers: memory is not yet an external durable event store
next_step: persist memory entries with signed or independently replayable receipts

evidence: brain provenance/lineage routes read origin fields verbatim
next_step: bind GitHub commits, HF SHAs, dataset SHAs, and deployment receipts per node

claim: Query audit receipts prove durable operation
evidence: query audit and receipt endpoints emit hash-linked/unsigned content digests
blockers: audit is restart-ephemeral; digest is not a signature
next_step: move audit to durable storage and approved signing

claim: LLM/router answer generation is live and weighted
evidence: szl_brain.py returns honest stubs without model backend evidence
blockers: no verified live model invocation or loaded-weight manifest in this ledger
next_step: create model availability endpoint with weight SHA and smoke-test receipt

claim: All models are fully trained and weighted
evidence: no reproducible training/eval receipt is present in this contract
blockers: cannot claim fully trained or fully weighted models without artifacts
next_step: publish training run receipts, eval metrics, licenses, and weight manifests
